Bus Timings

C10 Bus Timetable Hassa Bint Al Murr Masjid to Hamriya Port Travel Guide

December 26, 2025
By Al Khaleej
Install
★★★★★ 5.0
Google Play Official App
UAE Bus Timing

Travel across the UAE with confidence. No confusion. No wasted time.

Dubai Bus C10 offers a convenient transportation option connecting key landmarks and residential areas across the city. It provides a reliable service for commuters and tourists, facilitating travel between Hassa Bint Al Murr Masjid and Hamriya Port Control Tower Terminus.

Bus Timings

At the Hassa Bint Al Murr Masjid departure point, the C10 bus operates throughout the day at regular intervals. Services start early in the morning and continue until late at night, with timings scheduled approximately every 20 to 30 minutes during peak hours, ensuring frequent service availability.

From Hassa Bint Al Murr Masjid From Hamriya Port, Control Tower Terminus
05:00 06:00
05:30 06:30
06:05 07:05
06:25 07:25
06:45 07:45
07:05 08:05

Download PDF Bus C10

Bus C10 Timetable

For detailed information on the C10 bus timings, you can head to the official RTA website or access the schedule via this link: C10 Bus Timings.

Bus Route

The C10 route includes stops at the following locations:

  • Hassa Bint Al Murr Masjid

  • Mercato Shopping Mall
  • Collapse
  • Dubai Islamic Bank
  • Beach Center
  • Century Plaza
  • Palm Strip Center
  • Etihad Museum
  • ENOC, Dhiyafa
  • Jumeira Rotana Hotel
  • Dhiyafa, Road, 2
  • Hana Center
  • Hudheiba, Turnoff
  • Hoot, Eppco
  • ADCB Metro Landside
  • Centre Point Shopping Centre
  • BurJuman Metro, 2
  • BurJuman Metro · 4
  • Al Seef Marine
  • Al Seef Street
  • City Centre Metro · 2
  • Abu Hail Center
  • Ittihad School
  • Hamriya Shoping Center
  • Abu Hail Road
  • UAE Athletics Federation
  • Abu Hail, Roundabout
  • Hamriya Port
  • Sheikh Almar Masjid
  • Sheikh Almar Mosque Roundabout
  • Hamriya Port, Control Tower Terminus
  • Hamriya Port, Control Tower Terminus

Bus C10 Station Overview

Hassa Bint Al Murr Masjid

The Hassa Bint Al Murr Masjid bus station is strategically located near the Hassa Bint Al Murr Mosque, serving the surrounding residential and commercial areas. This station is designed to accommodate local commuters and visitors, offering essential amenities such as comfortable seating, ticketing services, and real-time schedule updates.

Its proximity to the mosque makes it a convenient stop for those attending religious services or engaging in community activities. The station’s location supports smooth connectivity to nearby neighborhoods and other key destinations in the area.

Abu Hail Center 2 Bus Stop Intersection

The Abu Hail Center 2 Bus Stop serves as a crucial intersection for Bus Routes 64, 13B, C09, and C10. This stop connects passengers to various destinations across Dubai, making it a vital hub for commuters in the Abu Hail area. Its proximity to the Abu Hail Center ensures convenient access to shopping, dining, and other services, catering to the needs of both locals and visitors.

City Centre Metro

Recommended Guides

Enhance your daily commute with these essential transport guides:

Complete RTA Intercity Routes Guide Largest Bus Stations Infrastructure in UAE

Dubai Bus C10 and Dubai Bus X28 share several key stops, with one notable common point being City Centre Metro. This intersection indicates a potential overlap in their routes, allowing passengers to transfer between these two bus services at this central location. The presence of City Centre Metro as a shared stop facilitates easier connections between different parts of Dubai, enhancing the efficiency of travel across the city’s extensive public transport network.

Hamriya Port, Control Tower Terminus

The Hamriya Port, Control Tower Terminus is a significant bus station located within the Hamriya Port area, a major commercial and industrial zone in Dubai.

Its strategic location near the port and control tower ensures easy access for workers, business operators, and visitors. The station plays a vital role in facilitating transportation within the port area and connecting passengers to broader city transit networks.

Bus Ticket Price

Passengers can enjoy affordable fares when traveling on the C10 bus route (typically around AED 3-5), with ticket prices designed to accommodate daily commuters and occasional travelers. Prices are set competitively to provide cost-effective transportation across Dubai.

Bus Booking

While the C10 bus route does not require advanced booking, passengers can conveniently plan their journey using real-time bus schedules available through the Roads and Transport Authority (RTA) Dubai app or website. This accessibility allows travelers to check bus timings and plan their trips accordingly, ensuring a smooth and hassle-free commute.

Journey Experience

The C10 bus route from Hassa Bint Al Murr Masjid to Hamriya Port offers a long yet captivating journey through Dubai, passing through vibrant commercial hubs and residential areas. Along the way, passengers can enjoy views of the historic Dubai Creek, a vital waterway in the city’s trading past.

The route also takes travelers near the Deira district, home to the famous Gold Souk and Spice Souk, where the rich heritage of old Dubai thrives amidst the bustling markets. While the trip is lengthy, it provides a unique mix of modern city life and historical charm, making it a fascinating ride for both locals and tourists.

Traveling with Careem

With the Careem app, travelers can conveniently reach Hamriya Port, Control Tower Terminus, the endpoint of the C10 bus route starting from Hassa Bint Al Murr Masjid. This route spans through various key stops including Mercato Shopping Mall, Dubai Islamic Bank, Beach Center, and City Centre Metro, offering an affordable travel option with fares ranging from AED 55 to 66.

Careem provides a seamless way to access this route, ensuring commuters and tourists alike can navigate Dubai’s diverse locations efficiently and economically.

Dubai Bus C10 stands as a reliable choice for navigating the city, offering accessibility to various commercial, residential, and cultural destinations. Whether exploring historical sites or commuting to work, the C10 bus provides a comfortable and efficient transport solution for all travelers in Dubai.

Official UAE Sources

For the latest schedules, fares, and policy updates, verify with these primary sources:

  • RTA Journey Planner
  • RTA Intercity Timetable Reference (E100)
  • Abu Dhabi Mobility
  • Sharjah Roads and Transport Authority (SRTA)

Editorial review date: December 26, 2025.
